chunks.title: David's Messengers to Hanun
chunks.reason: Describes the death of the Ammonite king and the insult David's envoys received.

chunks.title: Joab's Battle Against Ammon and Arameans
chunks.reason: Details the alliance formed by Ammon, Joab's tactical division of forces, and the first victory.

chunks.title: David Defeats the Arameans
chunks.reason: Narrates the gathering of a larger Aramean force and David's decisive victory leading to peace.
